---
title: "My Paul and Virginia: A Story of Some Incidents in the life of two American Children"
---

## My Paul and Virginia: A Story of Some Incidents in the life of two American Children
**Date:** 1881-1882
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1881-February 1882)

### Notes

\'Copyrighted in America\', according to <i>MP</i>, but it does not seem to have appeared in volume form in either the U.S. or Britain.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
